info.title: Dispute
info.description: You can use this synchronous inbound service to create, read, and update disputes in Debt Collections Management. It is based on the OData V4 protocol and can be consumed by external applications. The service contains the following nodes: Dispute, disputed receivable item, receivable item related to the dispute, resubmission, and note.

x-sap-shortText: Read, create, update and perform actions on disputes in Debt Collections Management using this synchronous inbound service

values.text: Finance - Collections and Dispute Automation - Dispute Integration (SAP_COM_0A83)
[Collections and Dispute Automation (7MA)](https://me.sap.com/processnavigator/SolP/7MA " Link To BP ")

x-sap-extensible.description:
If you are working with key user extensibility, the API can be extended by custom fields on the following business contexts (field usage for this API needs to be selected):
* Dispute (Collections and Dispute Automation) (/DCO/DISPUTE)
* Disputed Receivable Item (Collections and Dispute Automation) (/DCO/DISPUTED_REC_ITEM)

[How to add an extension field to an API](https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0f69f8fb28ac4bf48d2b57b9637e81fa/ce819b8557194ae0aa180ba4ac6a04de.html)
